auth.description: Authenticate with ServiceTitan and manage credential profiles

customers.description: Search, view, create, and update customer records

locations.description: View, create, and update customer service locations

jobs.description: Book, search, update, cancel, and complete service jobs

job-types.description: View job types used for booking and ID resolution

appointments.description: View job appointments and appointment details

techs.description: View technician profiles and performance data

employees.description: View employee records and roles from settings

business-units.description: View business units used across settings and jobs

memberships.description: Manage membership plans and customer memberships

leads.description: Manage incoming leads, dismiss them, or convert them to booked jobs

pricebook.description: Browse services, materials, and equipment from the pricebook

dispatch.description: View the dispatch board, capacity, and assign technicians

payroll.description: View payrolls, job timesheets, gross pay, and activity codes

inventory.description: View purchase orders, vendors, trucks, and warehouses

timesheets.description: View technician activities and activity types

bookings.description: Accept or dismiss online booking requests

api.description: Direct API access - call any ServiceTitan endpoint

completion.description: Install shell tab completion for bash, zsh, or fish
